description:
GeForce NOW connects to digital PC game stores so you can stream the library of games you already own

GeForce NOW instantly transforms nearly any laptop, desktop, Mac, SHIELD TV, Android device, iPhone, or iPad into the PC gaming rig you’ve always dreamed of.
Play the most demanding PC games and seamlessly play across your devices.
Codec Selection for Advanced Troubleshooting
- Members can now manually select the streaming codec in GeForce NOW settings on supported devices. By default, GeForce NOW automatically chooses the optimal codec for your session based on your device and network capabilities.
- Advanced users experiencing video corruption, compatibility, or performance issues can now override codec selection in Settings > Gameplay > Custom > Codec to help troubleshoot their streaming experience.
- Visit the NVIDIA Knowledgebase for more information.
Whatcha Thinking?
- Tell us about your streaming session, or what games you want to play, or suggest improvements we can make. Use that exclamation icon to send feedback in the app and let us know what you think.
